---
title: "Documentation"
description: "Browse the documentation for every EpiAware package without leaving the site."
page-layout: custom
toc: false
---

::: {.docs-intro}
Pick a package to read its documentation here, or open it in a new tab. Each
package's full docs are maintained in its own repository; this view keeps them
all in one place.
:::

::: {.docs-browser}
::: {.docs-toolbar}
<label for="pkg-select">Package</label>
<select id="pkg-select" aria-label="Choose a package"></select>
<a id="docs-open-ext" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open in new tab ↗</a>
<a id="docs-repo" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Source ↗</a>
:::
<iframe id="docs-frame" title="Package documentation" src="about:blank" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

```{=html}
<script>
const EPIAWARE_DOCS = [
  { name: "CensoredDistributions.jl",
    docs: "https://epiaware.github.io/CensoredDistributions.jl/",
    repo: "https://github.com/EpiAware/CensoredDistributions.jl" },
  { name: "ConvolvedDistributions.jl",
    docs: "https://epiaware.org/ConvolvedDistributions.jl/stable/",
    repo: "https://github.com/EpiAware/ConvolvedDistributions.jl" },
  { name: "ComposedDistributions.jl",
    docs: "https://epiaware.org/ComposedDistributions.jl/stable/",
    repo: "https://github.com/EpiAware/ComposedDistributions.jl" },
  { name: "EpiAwarePackageTools.jl",
    docs: "https://epiawarepackagetools.epiaware.org/stable/",
    repo: "https://github.com/EpiAware/EpiAwarePackageTools.jl" }
];

(function () {
  const sel = document.getElementById("pkg-select");
  const frame = document.getElementById("docs-frame");
  const ext = document.getElementById("docs-open-ext");
  const repo = document.getElementById("docs-repo");

  EPIAWARE_DOCS.forEach((p, i) => {
    const o = document.createElement("option");
    o.value = i; o.textContent = p.name; sel.appendChild(o);
  });

  function byName(name) {
    return EPIAWARE_DOCS.findIndex(p => p.name.toLowerCase() === (name || "").toLowerCase());
  }

  function show(i) {
    const p = EPIAWARE_DOCS[i];
    if (!p) return;
    sel.value = i;
    frame.src = p.docs;
    ext.href = p.docs;
    repo.href = p.repo;
    const url = new URL(window.location);
    url.searchParams.set("pkg", p.name);
    history.replaceState(null, "", url);
  }

  const start = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("pkg");
  const startIdx = start && byName(start) >= 0 ? byName(start) : 0;
  sel.addEventListener("change", () => show(parseInt(sel.value, 10)));
  show(startIdx);
})();
</script>
```
